channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Very deep problem. Danger to cyclists, 21st April
item.description:
In the road for traffic heading up the hill (south-west). Very dangerous for cyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Bayshill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
Give and take 15 db 28 day carriage way pothole approx 700x800x60mm number 1 plus x2 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose manhole cover, 21st April
item.description:
A resident contacted me about a loose manhole cover at the top of Overbury Street. It is the manhole closest to London Road I've been told, outside Overbury Cottage. Please can you arrange to have it fixed because it is quite loud for local residents. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221, London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
Pothole CW 500x300x40mm approx 2 way stop and go No parking cones required before work starting. Not able to mark or measure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover is loose - making noise when cars drive over it, 21st April
item.description:
Manhole cover opposite Overbury Cottage, Overbury St, GL53 8HJ is loose and making noise whenever cars drive over it. There are two manhole covers, the one that is loose is the manhole cover nearest to London Road (A40). It is the cover closest to the camera in the supplied photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overbury Street, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in the road - you can't miss it, 21st April
item.description:
Oh, you can because you missed 20 or 30 of them the last time you fixed the road. I'd give that a C- must try harder, it's just a hole in the road, fill it with something that is can't be washed away by a rain shower!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
Perm repair Cw pothole 1500x500mm Rd closure (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 21st April
item.description:
Damaged kerb. Please repair with concrete 200x100x40mm Standard TM with temp FW closure No parking cones required before work starting. (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 21st April
item.description:
Cw pothole 600x304x50mm X2 nsd Give and take (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same pothole back again just by the junction, 21st April
item.description:
When I reported this pothole to my MP last year and your PR people sent me a picture of your smiling crew as they filled in the pothole. Well what a shock it is back again and again, great job you lot!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Elm Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
